GENEFUNK.Settings.EnableModernFirearms.H: Reserved for GeneFunk firearm properties, ammo tracking, burst fire, and autofire automation.
GENEFUNK.Settings.EnableHackCardTracking: Reserved for hack-card resource tracking and usage automation.
GENEFUNK.Settings.EnableSheetBadges.Name: Show GeneFunk Sheet Badges
GENEFUNK.Settings.EnableSheetBadges.Hint: Adds a compact GeneFunk metadata badge to D&D 5e character sheets.
